name: api-learning
description: Analyze any project (Python, Go, Rust, Node.js, C#, Ruby, Java, etc.) outside-in from the API surface and build simplified Java reimplementations with progressive learning — includes api-blueprint (outline planning with Mermaid visualizations) and api-builder (feature implementation with 10-section tutorials, structured Insight blocks, and architecture diagrams) skills, powered by specialized agents for API surface exploration, vertical slice architecture design, and quality review with confidence scoring
